location: Sold by the Isolated Merchant at his shack on the northwestern edge of Greyoll's Dragonbarrow (overlooking the Great-Jar), for 4,000 runes. Also purchasable later from Twin Maiden Husks at Roundtable Hold after giving them his Bell Bearing.
tactics: Dragonbarrow is a high-level, dragon-infested area — approach on horseback and be ready to flee rather than fight.
Don't confuse with the plain Caestus sold by Gostoc in Limgrave — visually similar, but this one has built-in blood loss.
If the merchant is killed or missed, his Bell Bearing lets Twin Maiden Husks sell it instead.
lore: A standard caestus with its iron rivets swapped for blood-letting spikes, still worn as a pair like its plain counterpart.

builds.name: Bleed brawler
builds.why: Innate blood loss buildup on a light, D/D Strength/Dexterity weapon makes it a natural pick for a Strength/Dex bleed build.
